reference: I have no money and I know you charge, but I am going to try anyway. My mental illnesses are very severe. I am sixty-six years old; I have bipolar disorder type two and agoraphobia. I go through a lot of depression, and my entire family wants no contact with me. They think I am violent, but I am not. Can someone have mercy and help me?
text: I have no money, and I know the charge, but I am going to try anyway. My mental illnesses are very severe. I am sixty-six years old. I have bipolar disorder type two and agoraphobia. I go through a lot of depression, and my entire family wants no contact with me. They think I am violent, but I am not. Can someone have mercy and help me?
